ac_checks.basis: |H(fc)| = 1/sqrt(2) at fc = 1/(2*pi*R*C) = 1/(2*pi*1600*100e-9) = 994.72 Hz. In dB: 20*log10(1/sqrt(2)) = -3.0103 dB. Window +-1.4% -> +-0.14 dB from component tolerance (see derivation.md).
Passband: 100 Hz is ~10x below fc, |H| ~= 1 (0 dB) within 0.05 dB. Confirms the DC gain of the divider is unity.

Stopband rolloff: at 10*fc the first-order rolloff gives |H| = 1/sqrt(1+100) = -20.04 dB; the sweep sample at 10 kHz (~10.05*fc) is -20.13 dB. Window +-0.5 dB covers component tolerance and log-nearest sample slip.
